title: Tech: Revolution
description:
Tech: Revolution is a Minecraft modpack that includes technology, magic, exploration, quality of life improvements, and much more!

Our main server participates and events and lore as well! So we hope to see you there!
body:
# **This modpack is no longer receiving updates, you can get the new version here: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/prismatica-pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/prismatica-pack)**

# Introduction
Tech: Revolution is a technology based modpack that encourages and includes magic, combat, exploration, lore, and much more! This modpack is very experimental, so many things can break or change overtime! So please be warry!

The modpack includes many features and configurations to allow changing your experience. We do recommend staying on the default settings, but we aren't against playing on your own playstyle! We also have a [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/DEEFqGBr8P) and offical minecraft server, with a welcoming and fun community!

## Recommended Specifications
The recommended specifications for the modpack is mostly tied to enough RAM. We recommend using around 5000-8000Mb of RAM to play . We also recommend around a middle-end GPU and CPU.

To prevent any graphical issues, please use a GUI scale of 3 or lower. We strongly suggest using a 1920x1080 display or larger.

## The Minecraft Server
We highly recommend joining through using the offical minecraft server! As we encourage roleplaying with lore on the server! We also have an enconomy that is managed by the playerbase, and certain features are exclusive to the server!

The minecraft server has chat integration directly to our discord server! Making it easy to interact and meet new members! We hope to see you there!
